zh.lifeSummary: 當Mallt verch Rhun於1338年出生在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾特雷德加時，她的父親Rhûn "Gronwy" ap Gronwy69歲，母親Joan Verch Aron Ap Hywel64歲。她於大約1359年與Sir Morgan ap Llewelyn在英國威爾斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1384年在威爾士蒙姆爾特雷德加享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mallt verch Rhun于1338年出生在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾特雷德加时，她的父亲Rhûn "Gronwy" ap Gronwy69岁，母亲Joan Verch Aron Ap Hywel64岁。她于大约1359年与Sir Morgan ap Llewelyn在英国威尔斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1384年在威尔士蒙姆爾特雷德加享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Rhun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Yong, Kwang, Sang, Jin, Jong, Myung, Soon, Won, Jae, Kyung.  Korean Byung, Chang, Chong, Dae, Moon, Chung, Young Chul, Choon, Chul Ho, Jeong, Joo Young, Jung Hee.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 春, meaning ‘spring (season)’ in Chinese: (i) traced back to Chun Zi (春子), or Chun Ju (春居), the name of officials during the reign of King Xuan of Qi (ruler of the state of Qi, died 301  BC ). (ii) from the first element of Chun Shen (春申), title of Huang Xie (314– 238  BC ), known as one of the Four Lords of Warring States Period (475– 221  BC ), and also prime minister of the state of Chu.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surname 晉, see   Jin   3.

variants.name: Chhun
meanings: Cambodian: written ឈុន, of Chinese origin, from 春, meaning ‘spring’ (see   Chun   1).

variants.name: Jin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Wei, Yi, Sung, Yan, Hong, Jian, Jin, Li, Dong, Lei, Peng, Byung, Chang, Chang Hyun, Chul, Dae, Hak, Jeong, Seong, Tian, Yiping, Young Woo, Byung Soon.  Japanese Yu, Kaoru, Yue, Akiko, Chiaki, Hiroshi, Kyo, Naohiro, Susumu, Takashi, Yumi.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 金, meaning ‘gold’ in Chinese: (i) from Jin Tian (金天), title of the legendary king Shao Hao (c. 26th century BC ), the son of the legendary Huang Di, the ‘Yellow Emperor’ (c. 27th century BC ). Some of his descendants inherited 金, part of his title, as their surname. (ii) from Jin Midi (金日磾) (134–86 BC ), a prince of King Xiu Tu of the Huns, who was captured as a child and brought up at the Han imperial court. He became an official highly regarded by Emperor Wu of Han (156–87 BC ) and was appointed as master of the imperial stables. He made golden statues of horses to worship Heaven and because of this was given the surname Jin, 金 (meaning ‘gold’) by the emperor. (iii) for some families, the surname is traced back to the Liu (劉, see Lau) family living in the state of Wu Yue (907–978 AD , located in present-day Zhejiang, Jiangsu, and Fujian provinces), who changed their original surname 劉 to 金, because the former was pronounced the same as the personal name of the emperor Qian Liu (founder of the Wuyue Kingdom, 852–932 AD ), and it was taboo in ancient China to bear a name that was borne by the emperor. (iv) for some families, the surname is traced back to the minority ethnic groups of Qiangzu and Xinluo in northern China during the Southern and Northern dynasties (420–589 AD ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 靳, meaning ‘stingy’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Jin (靳), the name of a fief (located in Ningxiang in Hunan province) granted to Jin Shang (靳尚) (died 311  BC ), a noble official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) for some families, the surname can be traced back to the Huns in northern China, recorded in ancient Chinese history books.

nameMeanings.name: Mallt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Maud , a common name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Mallt verch Rhun was born in 1338, in Tredegar, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Rhûn "Gronwy" ap Gronwy, was 69 and her mother, Joan Verch Aron Ap Hywel, was 64. She married Sir Morgan ap Llewelyn about 1359, in Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1384, in Tredegar, Monmouthshire, Wales, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mallt verch Rhun est née en 1338, à Tredegar, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Rhûn "Gronwy" ap Gronwy, avait 69 ans et sa mère, Joan Verch Aron Ap Hywel, avait 64 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Morgan ap Llewelyn environ 1359, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1384, à Tredegar, Monmouthshire, Galles, à l’âge de 46 ans.

ko.Tredegyr Manor in Dyffryn, Monmouthshire: 웨일스 몬모우스실르 트레데그이르 먼어 인 디프린
ko.lifeSummary: Mallt verch Rhun(이)가 1338년 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 트레데가에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rhûn "Gronwy" ap Gronwy(은)는 69세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Verch Aron Ap Hywel(은)는 64세였다. 그녀는 대략 1359년 영국 웨일스에서 Sir Morgan ap Llewelyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1384년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 트레데가에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Tredegyr Manor in Dyffryn, Monmouthshire: тредегир манор ин диффрин, монмоутшир, Уэльс
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mallt verch Rhun родилась в 1338 г. в местности тредегар, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Rhûn "Gronwy" ap Gronwy было 69 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Verch Aron Ap Hywel, 64. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Morgan ap Llewelyn около 1359 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1384 г. в местности тредегар, монмоутшир, Уэльс в возрасте 46 лет.
